message:
refactor(env): finish dotenvy::var migration in redact_secrets and storage rebuild_batch_size_env

Two stragglers from the prior project-wide migration off
`std::env::var` to `dotenvy::var`.  Both call sites read CASS_*
configuration knobs at runtime, so they need to honour the
project's `.env` file the same way every other knob already does
(e.g., `CASS_TANTIVY_REBUILD_*` in src/indexer/mod.rs).

src/indexer/redact_secrets.rs::redaction_enabled
  CASS_REDACT_SECRETS now resolved via dotenvy::var, so the safety
  default ("redact unless explicitly disabled") still wins when the
  env var is absent and a `.env`-set `CASS_REDACT_SECRETS=0`
  correctly disables redaction.

src/storage/sqlite.rs::rebuild_batch_size_env
  Same migration for the rebuild-batch knobs that are read through
  this helper.  Default behaviour is unchanged when the variable
  is unset, but `.env`-driven tuning now works as documented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
